name: neo4j
description: Operate a Neo4j graph database with Cypher over the HTTP transactional API or cypher-shell.

neo4j_user.title: Username
neo4j_user.description: Neo4j username used for HTTP Basic authentication and cypher-shell.

neo4j_password.title: Password
neo4j_password.description: Neo4j password used for HTTP Basic authentication and cypher-shell.

neo4j_http_url.title: HTTP URL
neo4j_http_url.description: Neo4j HTTP transactional API base URL, usually http://host:7474. Recommended for curl-based workflows.

neo4j_url.title: Bolt URL
neo4j_url.description: Optional Neo4j Bolt URL, usually bolt://host:7687. Used by cypher-shell and as a fallback to derive the default HTTP URL.

neo4j_db.title: Database
neo4j_db.description: Neo4j database name for transactional API calls.
